name: MS Graph for Active Directory
description: Connects to Microsoft Active Directory using MS Graph REST API services to support various generic and investigative actions

parameters.name: filter_string
parameters.description: Filter string to apply to user listing

parameters.name: select_string
parameters.description: Select string to get additional user properties. Separate multiple values with commas

parameters.name: expand_string
parameters.description: Expand string to get a resource or collection referenced by a single relationship

parameters.name: use_advanced_query
parameters.description: Use advanced query capabilities

actions.name: Reset Password
actions.description: Reset or set a user's password in a Microsoft AD environment

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: User ID to change password - can be user principal name or object ID

parameters.name: force_change
parameters.description: Force user to change password on next login

parameters.name: temp_password
parameters.description: Temporary password for user

actions.name: Disable Tokens
actions.description: Invalidate all active refresh tokens for a user in a Microsoft AD environment

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: User ID to disable tokens of - can be user principal name or object ID

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: User ID to enable - can be user principal name or object ID

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: User ID to disable - can be user principal name or object ID

actions.name: List User Devices
actions.description: List devices for a specified user

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: User ID - can be user principal name or object ID

parameters.name: select_string
parameters.description: Select string to get additional user properties. Separate multiple values with commas

parameters.description: User ID - can be user principal name or object ID

actions.name: Set User Attribute
actions.description: Set an attribute for a user

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: User ID - can be user principal name or object ID

parameters.name: ph_0
parameters.description: Placeholder

parameters.name: attribute
parameters.description: Attribute to set

parameters.name: attribute_value
parameters.description: Value of attribute to set

parameters.description: Object ID of group

parameters.description: User ID to remove from group
